shellCommands.command: find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | head -80 && grep -R "finite\|thumbnail\|preload" -n packages src 2>/dev/null | head -120
git status --short && cat package.json
find test src -type f | sort | grep -E 'thumbnail|Carousel|test' | head -100
git log --oneline --all -- src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx | head -20 && git remote -v
grep -R "placeholder" -n test/unit src/plugins/thumbnails README.md docs | head -80
git show bafdda0 -- src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx src/modules/Carousel.tsx
git log -p -8 -- src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx
grep -R "preload:" -n src | head && grep -R "globalIndex" -n src/modules/Controller | head -30
git branch -a --contains HEAD && git tag --contains HEAD | head
git log --oneline --all -30
git remote -v; git status --short; grep -n "calculatePreload" -R src || true
grep -R "globalIndex" -n src | head -40; git show bafdda0^:src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx | sed -n '85,130p'
git ls-remote https://github.com/igordanchenko/yet-another-react-lightbox.git HEAD refs/heads/master 2>/dev/null | head
git fetch https://github.com/igordanchenko/yet-another-react-lightbox.git master --quiet && git log --all --oneline -- src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx | head -20

git fetch https://github.com/igordanchenko/yet-another-react-lightbox.git HEAD:refs/remotes/upstream/main --quiet && git log refs/remotes/upstream/main --oneline -- src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx | head -15
git show f63f6af -- src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx test/unit/plugins/Thumbnails.spec.ts
git show f63f6af^:src/utils.ts | grep -n "calculatePreload" -C 5; git show f63f6af:src/utils.ts | grep -n "calculatePreload" -C 8; git show f63f6af:src/index.ts | grep calculatePreload
git show --stat f63f6af && git show f63f6af -- src/utils.ts src/modules/Carousel.tsx src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx
tail -20 src/utils.ts | cat -A
npx vitest run test/unit/plugins/Thumbnails.spec.ts
npm run build
git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/utils.ts src/modules/Carousel.tsx src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx | head -200

git checkout -- src/utils.ts && python3 - <<'PY'
p='src/utils.ts'
s=open(p).read()
s=s.replace('    ContainerRect,
', '    CarouselSettings,
    ContainerRect,
')
s += '
export function calculatePreload(carousel: CarouselSettings, slides: Slide[], minimum = 0) {
    return Math.min(
        carousel.preload,
        Math.max(carousel.finite ? slides.length - 1 : Math.floor(slides.length / 2), minimum)
    );
}
'
open(p,'w').write(s)
for p in ['src/modules/Carousel.tsx','src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx']:
 s=open(p).read();
 if not s.endswith('
'): open(p,'w').write(s+'
')
PY
npm run build >/tmp/build.log && tail -8 /tmp/build.log
git diff --stat
